description: Intent-only request: classify proactive on-call burnout monitoring as agent-anchored due to heartbeat-driven behavior.

conversation.text: Have an agent proactively monitor our on-call rotation for burnout signs — who's been paged, when, how often — and suggest coverage shifts before it becomes a problem.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the heartbeat-driven, proactive monitoring behavior — periodically waking, checking state, and deciding whether and how to intervene — is characteristic of an agent-anchored design rather than a fixed workflow trigger.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
